hook.summary: Miniature figures in traditional Chinese dress harvest a giant lemon.
hook.visual_action: Figures walk by a river with koi, then climb a ladder to pick a massive lemon.

scene_flow: Miniature figures walk along a scenic river path towards a lemon orchard.
The group works together to harvest a giant lemon using a ladder and a net.
The lemon is transported, washed in a wooden tub, and sliced on a large board.
Juice is extracted using a wooden press and mixed with large ice cubes in a glass.
The finished lemonade is served to an elder and enjoyed by the whole group.
audience_proxy: Fans of cozy, miniature aesthetics and traditional Chinese culture who enjoy satisfying process videos.
